slides.title: Stopping Early 🛑
slides.content:
Sometimes you want to stop looping before the end.

Use `break` to exit instantly.

slides.title: Finding a Value 🔍
Skipping ⏭️
slides.content: Use `continue` to skip the **rest** of the current loop and jump to the next one.

slides.title: Only Evens 2️⃣

quizData.question: Which keyword skips just the current iteration?
quizData.explanation: `continue` moves to the next cycle. `break` stops completely.
